name: biaozhu-platform
description: 内容审核标注平台 - 前后端一体化工程

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.install:py: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest app/tests -v
